name: Sanji (Reprint)
effect_text: If the number of DON!! cards on your field is at least 2 less than the number on your opponent's field, give this card in your hand -3 cost.[Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
